AWS Libcrypto (AWS-LC)

AWS-LC is a fork of BoringSSL, which is itself a fork of OpenSSL.
Content from these and other sources retains their original licensing,
as described below. New files from AWS-LC are made available under the Apache-2.0 license OR the ISC
license. These licenses are reproduced at the bottom of this file.

```
Copyright Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates. All Rights Reserved.
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 OR ISC
```

BoringSSL
================================================================================

BoringSSL is a Google-maintained fork of OpenSSL. Historically, code
authored by Google for BoringSSL was licensed under the ISC License.
BoringSSL has since relicensed upstream to Apache License 2.0. Existing
AWS-LC code originating from BoringSSL retains its ISC license, while
newer code taken from BoringSSL is licensed under Apache License 2.0.

Wycheproof Test Vectors

Project Wycheproof is a community managed repository of test vectors that can be used by cryptography library
developers to test against known attacks, specification inconsistencies, and other various implementation bugs.

yasna.rs: ASN.1 library for Rust","","[![Build Status](https://github.com/qnighy/yasna.rs/actions/workflows/test.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/qnighy/yasna.rs/actions)","[![](https://img.shields.io/crates/v/yasna.svg)](https://crates.io/crates/yasna)","","This is a Rust library for reading and writing ASN.1 data.","","- [crates.io/crates/yasna](https://crates.io/crates/yasna)","- [Documentation](https://qnighy.github.io/yasna.rs/yasna/index.html)","","Since this library is at an early stage, the APIs are subject to change. However, `BERReader` and `DERWriter` functionalities are getting stable.","","## Serialization/Construction","","Serialization in DER (Distinguished Encoding Rules) is supported. It can also be used for serialization in BER (Basic Encoding Rules).","","```rust","fn main() {","    let der = yasna::construct_der(|writer| {","        writer.write_sequence(|writer| {","            writer.next().write_i64(10);","            writer.next().write_bool(true);","            return Ok(());","        })","    });","    println!(\"(10, true) = {:?}\", der);","}","```","","Currently, these datatypes are supported:","","- BOOLEAN, INTEGER, BITSTRING, OCTETSTRING, NULL, OBJECT IDENTIFIER,","- SEQUENCE, SEQUENCE OF, SET, SET OF, CHOICE,","- UTF8String, NumericString, PrintableString, VisibleString, IA5String, BMPString,","- UTCTime, GeneralizedTime,","- Explicitly/Implicitly tagged types,","- DEFAULT/OPTIONAL in SEQUENCE/SET.","","These datatypes are *not* supported:","","- REAL","- TeletexString, VideotexString, GraphicString, GeneralString, UniversalString,","- TIME, DATE, TIME-OF-DAY, DATE-TIME, DURATION.","","## Deserialization/Parsing","","Deserialization in BER (Basic Encoding Rules) or DER (Distinguished Encoding Rules) is supported.","","```rust","fn main() {","    let asn = yasna::parse_der(\u0026[48, 6, 2, 1, 10, 1, 1, 255], |reader| {","        reader.read_sequence(|reader| {","            let i = reader.next().read_i64()?;","            let b = reader.next().read_bool()?;","            return Ok((i, b));","        })","    }).unwrap();","    println!(\"{:?} = [48, 6, 2, 1, 10, 1, 1, 255]\", asn);","}","```","","Currently, these datatypes are supported:","","- BOOLEAN, INTEGER, BITSTRING, OCTETSTRING, NULL, OBJECT IDENTIFIER,","- SEQUENCE, SEQUENCE OF, SET, SET OF, CHOICE,","- UTF8String, NumericString, PrintableString, VisibleString, IA5String, BMPString,","- UTCTime, GeneralizedTime,","- Explicitly/Implicitly tagged types,","- DEFAULT/OPTIONAL in SEQUENCE.","","These datatypes are *not* supported:","","- REAL","- TeletexString, VideotexString, GraphicString, GeneralString, UniversalString,","- TIME, DATE, TIME-OF-DAY, DATE-TIME, DURATION.","- DEFAULT/OPTIONAL in SET.","","## Other encodings","","This library is currently specialized for BER (Basic Encoding Rules) and DER (Distinguished Encoding Rules). Other encodings such as CER (Canonical Encoding Rules), PER (Packed Encoding Rules), and XER (XML Encoding Rules) are currently out of scope.","","## Streaming","","This library is currently specialized for on-memory serialization/deserialization. There are no plans for streaming ones.","","## Compatibility","","The minimum supported Rust version (MSRV) of `yasna.rs` is Rust 1.60.0.","Optional feature flags that enable interoperability with third-party crates (e.g. `time`) follow the policy of that crate if stricter.","","## License","","This library is distributed under MIT/Apache-2.0 dual license."],"stylingDirectives":[[[0,34,"pl-mh"],[2,34,"pl-en"]],[],[[0,1,"pl-s"],[1,3,"pl-s"],[15,16,"pl-s"],[16,17,"pl-s"],[17,88,"pl-corl"],[88,90,"pl-s"],[90,91,"pl-s"],[91,133,"pl-corl"],[133,134,"pl-s"]],[[0,1,"pl-s"],[1,3,"pl-s"],[3,4,"pl-s"],[4,5,"pl-s"],[5,46,"pl-corl"],[46,48,"pl-s"],[48,49,"pl-s"],[49,79,"pl-corl"],[79,80,"pl-s"]],[],[],[],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[2,3,"pl-s"],[25,26,"pl-s"],[26,27,"pl-s"],[27,57,"pl-corl"],[57,58,"pl-s"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"],[2,3,"pl-s"],[16,17,"pl-s"],[17,18,"pl-s"],[18,68,"pl-corl"],[68,69,"pl-s"]],[],[[82,83,"pl-s"],[83,92,"pl-c1"],[92,93,"pl-s"],[98,99,"pl-s"],[99,108,"pl-c1"],[108,109,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,29,"pl-mh"],[3,29,"pl-en"]],[],[],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,7,"pl-en"]],[[0,2,"pl-k"],[3,7,"pl-en"]],[[4,7,"pl-k"],[8,11,"pl-smi"],[12,13,"pl-k"],[14,19,"pl-en"],[19,21,"pl-k"],[21,34,"pl-en"],[35,36,"pl-k"],[36,42,"pl-smi"],[42,43,"pl-k"]],[[8,14,"pl-smi"],[14,15,"pl-k"],[15,29,"pl-en"],[30,31,"pl-k"],[31,37,"pl-smi"],[37,38,"pl-k"]],[[12,18,"pl-smi"],[18,19,"pl-k"],[19,23,"pl-en"],[25,26,"pl-k"],[26,35,"pl-en"],[36,38,"pl-c1"]],[[12,18,"pl-smi"],[18,19,"pl-k"],[19,23,"pl-en"],[25,26,"pl-k"],[26,36,"pl-en"],[37,41,"pl-c1"]],[[12,18,"pl-k"],[19,21,"pl-en"]],[],[],[[4,12,"pl-en"],[13,32,"pl-s"],[13,14,"pl-pds"],[31,32,"pl-pds"],[34,37,"pl-smi"]],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"]],[],[],[],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[],[[20,21,"pl-s"],[24,25,"pl-s"]],[],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[[0,1,"pl-v"]],[],[[0,26,"pl-mh"],[3,26,"pl-en"]],[],[],[],[[0,3,"pl-s"],[3,7,"pl-en"]],[[0,2,"pl-k"],[3,7,"pl-en"]],[[4,7,"pl-k"],[8,11,"pl-smi"],[12,13,"pl-k"],[14,19,"pl-en"],[19,21,"pl-k"],[21,30,"pl-en"],[31,32,"pl-k"],[33,35,"pl-c1"],[37,38,"pl-c1"],[40,41,"pl-c1"],[43,44,"pl-c1"],[46,48,"pl-c1"],[50,51,"pl-c1"],[53,54,"pl-c1"],[56,59,"pl-c1"],[62,63,"pl-k"],[63,69,"pl-smi"],[69,70,"pl-k"]],[[8,14,"pl-smi"],[14,15,"pl-k"],[15,28,"pl-en"],[29,30,"pl-k"],[30,36,"pl-smi"],[36,37,"pl-k"]],[[12,15,"pl-k"],[16,17,"pl-smi" class="prc-TooltipV2-Tooltip-tLeuB" data-direction="nw" aria-hidden="true" id="_R_3t3j6alajal1d_">Edit and raw actions</span></div></div></div></div><div></div></div><div class="BlobViewContent-module__blobContentWrapper__JS0W6"><section aria-labelledby="file-name-id-wide file-name-id-mobile" class="BlobContent-module__blobContentSection__VOgZq BlobContent-module__blobContentSectionMarkdown__mPLOK" style="margin-top:46px"><div class="js-snippet-clipboard-copy-unpositioned BlobContent-module__markdownBlob__T8jpG" data-hpc="true"><article class="markdown-body entry-content container-lg" itemprop="text"><div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h1 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">yasna.rs: ASN.1 library for Rust</h1><a id="user-content-yasnars-asn1-library-for-rust" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: yasna.rs: ASN.1 library for Rust" href="#yasnars-asn1-library-for-rust"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><a href="https://github.com/qnighy/yasna.rs/actions"><img src="https://github.com/qnighy/yasna.rs/actions/workflows/test.yml/badge.svg" alt="Build Status" style="max-width: 100%;"></a>
<a href="https://crates.io/crates/yasna" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://camo.githubusercontent.com/87710dc439f5d959c9b67f729a728b73eb0ac0ab12e5c8eeb9a692d421ad78d0/68747470733a2f2f696d672e736869656c64732e696f2f6372617465732f762f7961736e612e737667" alt="" data-canonical-src="https://img.shields.io/crates/v/yasna.svg" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p>
<p dir="auto">This is a Rust library for reading and writing ASN.1 data.</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><a href="https://crates.io/crates/yasna" rel="nofollow">crates.io/crates/yasna</a></li>
<li><a href="https://qnighy.github.io/yasna.rs/yasna/index.html" rel="nofollow">Documentation</a></li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Since this library is at an early stage, the APIs are subject to change. However, <code>BERReader</code> and <code>DERWriter</code> functionalities are getting stable.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Serialization/Construction</h2><a id="user-content-serializationconstruction" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Serialization/Construction" href="#serializationconstruction"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Serialization in DER (Distinguished Encoding Rules) is supported. It can also be used for serialization in BER (Basic Encoding Rules).</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-rust notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="fn main() {
    let der = yasna::construct_der(|writer| {
        writer.write_sequence(|writer| {
            writer.next().write_i64(10);
            writer.next().write_bool(true);
            return Ok(());
        })
    });
    println!(&quot;(10, true) = {:?}&quot;, der);
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">fn</span> <span class="pl-en">main</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-k">let</span> der = yasna<span class="pl-kos">::</span><span class="pl-en">construct_der</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span>|writer| <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        writer<span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">write_sequence</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span>|writer| <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
            writer<span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">next</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">write_i64</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-c1">10</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
            writer<span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">next</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">write_bool</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-c1">true</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
            <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-en">Ok</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
    <span class="pl-en">println</span><span class="pl-en">!</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"(10, true) = {:?}"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> der<span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Currently, these datatypes are supported:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>BOOLEAN, INTEGER, BITSTRING, OCTETSTRING, NULL, OBJECT IDENTIFIER,</li>
<li>SEQUENCE, SEQUENCE OF, SET, SET OF, CHOICE,</li>
<li>UTF8String, NumericString, PrintableString, VisibleString, IA5String, BMPString,</li>
<li>UTCTime, GeneralizedTime,</li>
<li>Explicitly/Implicitly tagged types,</li>
<li>DEFAULT/OPTIONAL in SEQUENCE/SET.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">These datatypes are <em>not</em> supported:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>REAL</li>
<li>TeletexString, VideotexString, GraphicString, GeneralString, UniversalString,</li>
<li>TIME, DATE, TIME-OF-DAY, DATE-TIME, DURATION.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Deserialization/Parsing</h2><a id="user-content-deserializationparsing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Deserialization/Parsing" href="#deserializationparsing"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Deserialization in BER (Basic Encoding Rules) or DER (Distinguished Encoding Rules) is supported.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-rust notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="fn main() {
    let asn = yasna::parse_der(&amp;[48, 6, 2, 1, 10, 1, 1, 255], |reader| {
        reader.read_sequence(|reader| {
            let i = reader.next().read_i64()?;
            let b = reader.next().read_bool()?;
            return Ok((i, b));
        })
    }).unwrap();
    println!(&quot;{:?} = [48, 6, 2, 1, 10, 1, 1, 255]&quot;, asn);
}"><pre><span class="pl-k">fn</span> <span class="pl-en">main</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span> <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
    <span class="pl-k">let</span> asn = yasna<span class="pl-kos">::</span><span class="pl-en">parse_der</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-c1">&amp;</span><span class="pl-kos">[</span><span class="pl-c1">48</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">6</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">2</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">1</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">10</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">1</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">1</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">255</span><span class="pl-kos">]</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> |reader| <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
        reader<span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">read_sequence</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span>|reader| <span class="pl-kos">{</span>
            <span class="pl-k">let</span> i = reader<span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">next</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">read_i64</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>?<span class="pl-kos">;</span>
            <span class="pl-k">let</span> b = reader<span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">next</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">read_bool</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>?<span class="pl-kos">;</span>
            <span class="pl-k">return</span> <span class="pl-en">Ok</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span>i<span class="pl-kos">,</span> b<span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
        <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span>
    <span class="pl-kos">}</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">.</span><span class="pl-en">unwrap</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
    <span class="pl-en">println</span><span class="pl-en">!</span><span class="pl-kos">(</span><span class="pl-s">"{:?} = [48, 6, 2, 1, 10, 1, 1, 255]"</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> asn<span class="pl-kos">)</span><span class="pl-kos">;</span>
<span class="pl-kos">}</span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Currently, these datatypes are supported:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>BOOLEAN, INTEGER, BITSTRING, OCTETSTRING, NULL, OBJECT IDENTIFIER,</li>
<li>SEQUENCE, SEQUENCE OF, SET, SET OF, CHOICE,</li>
<li>UTF8String, NumericString, PrintableString, VisibleString, IA5String, BMPString,</li>
<li>UTCTime, GeneralizedTime,</li>
<li>Explicitly/Implicitly tagged types,</li>
<li>DEFAULT/OPTIONAL in SEQUENCE.</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">These datatypes are <em>not</em> supported:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>REAL</li>
<li>TeletexString, VideotexString, GraphicString, GeneralString, UniversalString,</li>
<li>TIME, DATE, TIME-OF-DAY, DATE-TIME, DURATION.</li>
<li>DEFAULT/OPTIONAL in SET.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Other encodings</h2><a id="user-content-other-encodings" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Other encodings" href="#other-encodings"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This library is currently specialized for BER (Basic Encoding Rules) and DER (Distinguished Encoding Rules). Other encodings such as CER (Canonical Encoding Rules), PER (Packed Encoding Rules), and XER (XML Encoding Rules) are currently out of scope.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Streaming</h2><a id="user-content-streaming" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Streaming" href="#streaming"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This library is currently specialized for on-memory serialization/deserialization. There are no plans for streaming ones.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Compatibility</h2><a id="user-content-compatibility" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Compatibility" href="#compatibility"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The minimum supported Rust version (MSRV) of <code>yasna.rs</code> is Rust 1.60.0.
Optional feature flags that enable interoperability with third-party crates (e.g. <code>time</code>) follow the policy of that crate if stricter.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">License</h2><a id="user-content-license" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: License" href="#license"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
